entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-SingelAccount/Group Creation-Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE Attributes PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="account" value="CN=Aiden markram,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <entry key="applications" value="ActiveDirectory"/> <entry key="detectedRoleChanges" value="1"/> <entry key="exceptionChanges" value="1"/> <entry key="identityEntitlementsCreated" value="10"/> <entry key="identityEntitlementsRoleAssignmentsUpdates" value="1"/> <entry key="identityEntitlementsRoleDetectionsRemoves" value="2"/> <entry key="internalUpdates" value="1"/> <entry key="total" value="1"/> <entry key="updated" value="1"/> </Map> </Attributes>
